recommendations.title: Den of Thieves 2: Pantera
recommendations.overview: Big Nick is back on the hunt in Europe and closing in on Donnie, who is embroiled in the treacherous and unpredictable world of diamond thieves and the infamous Panther mafia, as they plot a massive heist of the world's largest diamond exchange.

recommendations.title: As Tears Go By
recommendations.overview: Mid-level gangster Wah falls in love with his beautiful cousin, but must also continue to protect his volatile partner-in-crime and friend, Fly.

recommendations.title: Ocean's Eight
recommendations.overview: Debbie Ocean, a criminal mastermind, gathers a crew of female thieves to pull off the heist of the century at New York's annual Met Gala.

recommendations.title: Widows
recommendations.overview: A police shootout leaves four thieves dead during an explosive armed robbery attempt in Chicago. Their widows have nothing in common except a debt left behind by their spouses' criminal activities. Hoping to forge a future on their own terms, they jo

recommendations.title: Fallen Angels
recommendations.overview: An assassin goes through obstacles as he attempts to escape his violent lifestyle despite the opposition of his partner, who is secretly attracted to him.

recommendations.title: The Hurricane Heist
recommendations.overview: Thieves attempt a massive heist against the U.S. Treasury as a Category 5 hurricane approaches one of its Mint facilities.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu League
recommendations.overview: A poor comic book artist summons four legendary Kung Fu masters to learn the highest level of martial arts and help him get his girl.

recommendations.title: Skiptrace
recommendations.overview: A detective from Hong Kong teams up with an American gambler to battle against a notorious Chinese criminal.

recommendations.title: The Rats: A Witcher Tale
recommendations.overview: To pull off a daring heist, a gang of six misfit outlaws will have to do something they've never done before: trust each other — and a washed-up Witcher.

recommendations.title: Rise of the Guardians
recommendations.overview: When an evil spirit known as Pitch lays down the gauntlet to take over the world, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.
